title: Primus Weekly Engineering Report — 2026-W22
key_findings: 4 PRs merged to main in the 2026-W22 window (Bug Fix: 2, CI/Infra: 1, Other: 1).

No backend dependency pin change this week: PRIMUS_TURBO_COMMIT, PRIMUS_TURBO_AITER_COMMIT, TRITON_COMMIT, ROCSHMEM_COMMIT, and UCCL_COMMIT in .github/workflows/ci.yaml and .github/workflows/benchmark.yaml are unchanged from origin/main HEAD prior to the window. No third_party/* submodule SHA changed.

PR #731 wires args.deterministic_mode through PrimusTurboAttention so the underlying flash-attention call honors deterministic mode (previously hard-coded deterministic=False); refactors validate_args_on_rocm to drive deterministic-mode env validation from a single NON_DETERMINISTIC_ENVS mapping and extends the required set with PRIMUS_TURBO_AUTO_TUNE=0 and PRIMUS_DETERMINISTIC=1; runner/helpers/envs/base_env.sh auto-exports PRIMUS_TURBO_AUTO_TUNE=0 when PRIMUS_DETERMINISTIC=1.

PR #732 fixes the modern CLI override parser to safely literal_eval values starting with [, (, {, or equal to None so --profile_ranks '[0]' is converted to a real list (previously passed as the string '[0]', breaking Megatron's int in args.profile_ranks check); adds a new dedicated tests/unit_tests/core/utils/test_arg_utils.py covering bool/int/float/string/list/dict/None and parse_cli_overrides.

PR #727 adds a Megatron gpt_oss_20B sink-attention trainer functional test with micro_batch_size=2 (global_batch_size=16) so BSHD/SBHD transpose regressions in the Primus Turbo attention path are not masked by micro_batch_size=1 broadcasting.

PR #440 adds automatic MLflow artifact upload of PyTorch profiler trace files (tensorboard_dir) and training log files (exp_root_path/logs/) under artifacts/traces/ and artifacts/logs/ at end of training when MLflow is enabled; new runner options mlflow_upload_traces and mlflow_upload_logs; MLflow env vars passed through into the docker container; tensorboard_dir uses a unique timestamp-based suffix for multi-node consistency.

Megatron-LM upstream drift: pin d3528a21 (2026-03-06) is now 603 commits behind upstream HEAD ba9e0eaf (2026-05-28), +145 since W19. Highlights since W19: switch DSv3 on H100 to HybridEP (#5039), thread position_ids through MimoModel for multimodal RoPE (#4938), Megatron-FSDP full-iteration CUDA graphability (#4663), drain predecessor reduce-scatter at dispatch time (#4940), Paged Stashing (#4247), MTP-stage word_embeddings correctness tag (#5034), DDP wrap pg-size fixes (#5006), Release MTP assertion when EP overlap with PP=1 (#4796), TE 2.15 compatibility fix in cuda_graphs (#4874), TEFusedDenseMLP Dense+Grouped GEMM fusion (#4786), MTP recompute crash fix with packed sequences (#4593), MimoOptimizer non-colocated MIMO dist-ckpt fix (#4801). Recommendation: plan sync (unchanged).

torchtitan upstream drift: pin 5fb7cc2e (2025-10-15) is now 680 commits behind upstream HEAD 92abc88e (2026-05-28), +70 since W19. Highlights since W19: RoPE refactor using model's max_sequence_length (#3395) + fix #3448, MoE refactor series [MoE][5/n]..[MoE][8/n] (#3386, #3389, #3423, #3425), [MoE][SAC] deterministic ops (#3146), [graph_trainer] separate EP process groups for overlap (#3369), [graph_trainer] DSv3 16B SDPA config (#3361), [graph_trainer] rework full_inductor_compilation_pass via regional_inductor (#3346), FSDP symmetric-memory configuration (#3105), [Module] replace from_nn_module with native Module subclasses (#3398), [rl] add Batcher in RL Loop (#3347), [loss] fix ChunkedCELoss + TP gradient placement mismatch (#3412). Recommendation: urgent sync (unchanged).

Primus-Turbo monthly drift: pins did NOT move this week. Current pins (CI and benchmark) at 06b8d3fe (Primus-Turbo #278, HYBRID FP8 format support for Triton backend in gemm and grouped_gemm) are +39 (CI) / +44 (benchmark) commits ahead of May month-start values 333b68d7 (CI) / a4488f6c (benchmark); AITER pin is b5e03ed1 vs month-start e83f9903; TRITON_COMMIT=88b227e is present vs not-present at month start. The drift is carried over from W19 PR #694 and W21 PR #723. Recommendation: monitor.

Backend-gap reports were not regenerated this week: no submodule SHA changed (Megatron-LM, torchtitan, Megatron-Bridge, Emerging-Optimizers, HummingbirdXT, maxtext are all unchanged on origin/main) and no tracked-config backend version pin changed in this window.
